( s i M m ) f m , i 9 8 3 % 'P m i 6 % ^ - f T t m ( i ) ’Si, I [ W -& 8 1 0 / 8 9 / (l9 )/ 9 4 - 1 ^ ^ (T f t° )] TTT^feujuft:—T i^fW T » m 7 T ^ 5rartnV iIlT 5m % «FT II 73™^ 3 ( i ) ^ f k ^ 9 - 5 - 8 3 381 ( 3 l ) % ( 1 ) W ^»5P f¥83 ( 3 T ) - R r ^ 28 - 2 - 8 4 ; ( 7 ) 603 (3 ? ) 3 - 8-94 ; U ) ^ 413 <=,) 2 9 -5 -8 4 , ^ , ( 3 ) 81 4 (3 1 ) 1 3 -12- 84; ^ ^ ( 4 ) 772 (3 1 ) 21 -1 0 - 8 9 ; 817 (3 1 ) 16-11- 94; ( 5 ) 702 (3T) 2 7 - 1 1 - 9 1 ; ( 1 0 ) 121 (3 ? ) 11-3-9 5; ( 6 ) 67 (3 ? ) 3 0 -1-9 2; ( 1 1 ) 370 (3T) 2 8 - 4 - 9 5 I 3019GI/95 (I) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ; EXTRAORDINARY [P a r t II— S e c . 3{i)] MINISTRY OF INFORMATION & BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th December, 1995 G.S.R- 7 9 8 (E),—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 8 of the Cinematograph Act, 1952 (37 of 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, namely :— 1. Short title and commencement.—( I) These rules may be called the Cinematograph (Certification) (Third Amend ment) Rules, 1995. (2)They shall come into force with effect from the 1st January, 1996. 2. In the Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, in sub-rule (1) of rule 16, for the words "seven clear days" the words "twenty one clear days" shaJl be substituted. [File No. 810/89/(l 9)/94-F(C)] RAGHU MENON, Jt. Secy. Foot N ote:— The principal rule was published, v/i/e No. GSR 381(E) dated 9-5-83 in the Extraordinary Gazette o f India, Part II, Section 3(i) and subsequently amended by ; (i) GSR 83(E) dated 28-2-84; (it) GSR 4 13(E) dated 29-5-84; (iii) GSR 814(E) dated 13-12-84 (iv) GSR 772(E) dated 21-10-89 (V) GSR 702(E) dated 27 -1 1 -9 1 (vi) GSR 67(E) dated 30-1-92; (vii) GSR 603(E) dated 3-8-94; (viii) GSR 816(E) dated 16-11-94; (ix) GSR 817(E) dated 16-11-94; (X ) GSR 121(E) dated 11-3-95; (xi) GSR 370(E) dated 28-4-95.
